name: pyxis
description: Pyxis — C++23 USD-native real-time path tracer (NVRHI/Vulkan, Slang). Plan §4 / §49.
$plan-references: §4 third-party dependency table (canonical justification per dep)
§33.10 spdlog SHARED linkage rule (Tracy follows the same rule)
§49 single source of truth for versions: builtin-baseline below + _cmake/Thirdparty.cmake's GIT_TAG SHAs are reviewed together
$builtin-baseline-comment: Pinned baseline of the Microsoft/vcpkg registry — this *is* what reproduces a build (§49).
All ports below resolve to whatever version the baseline lists; we do not pin individual
versions on top, since that fights vcpkg's version-database resolution and makes lockstep
bumps painful. To bump: update this hash AND the GIT_TAG SHAs in _cmake/Thirdparty.cmake
in the same PR (CI's _tools/check_pins.py asserts both files move together).

dependencies.name: spdlog
dependencies.$comment: Logging. Linked SHARED via the x64-windows-pyxis triplet — see plan §33.10.

dependencies.name: fmt
dependencies.$comment: Required transitively by spdlog when external-fmt is on; pinned via baseline.

dependencies.name: gtest
dependencies.$comment: Unit tests (pyxis_unit_tests). Not shipped in release. Plan §4.

dependencies.name: nlohmann-json
dependencies.$comment: parameters.json parsing + JSON profiling output. Plan §4 / §21.

dependencies.name: stb
dependencies.$comment: stb_image / stb_image_write — LDR decode + PNG output. Plan §4.

dependencies.name: mikktspace
dependencies.$comment: Tangent-space generation for normal maps. Plan §4 / §14.

dependencies.name: hlslpp
dependencies.$comment: HLSL-shaped C++ math types — appears in pyxis_renderer/Public/. Plan §4 / §23.

dependencies.name: tracy
dependencies.$comment: CPU/GPU profiling. Linked SHARED via x64-windows-pyxis triplet (§33.10). Pin same minor as the server (§4).

dependencies.name: concurrentqueue
dependencies.$comment: moodycamel MPMC lock-free queue — ingest→render thread mutation queue. Plan §4 / §31 / §18.5.

dependencies.name: flecs
dependencies.$comment: ECS for SceneWorld. Linked PRIVATE into pyxis_renderer; no Flecs header escapes Public/. Plan §4 / §8 / §30.11. The vcpkg port builds Flecs's monolithic profile (FLECS_REST + FLECS_HTTP enabled at compile time), so the Explorer UI at http://localhost:27750 is reachable in any build — Pyxis still gates the *call* to flecs::Rest behind PYXIS_DEBUG_TOOLS so production builds don't bind the listen socket (§30.11).

$imgui-comment: ImGui (docking branch) is pulled via FetchContent in _cmake/Thirdparty.cmake instead of vcpkg.
vcpkg's imgui[vulkan-binding] feature transitively pulls vulkan-loader, whose source archive on GitHub returns 502 intermittently.
Source-tree fetch lets us compile the backends (imgui_impl_vulkan.cpp + imgui_impl_glfw.cpp) directly against our system Vulkan SDK + the vcpkg glfw3.
